title: Why was the point of senselessly bashing EVA 03 into goo
display_title: Why was the point of senselessly bashing EVA 03 into goo
wikitext:
[]: Why was the point of senselessly bashing EVA-03 into goo?             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sat Aug 08, 2009 10:35 pm Shouldn't have NERV at least TRIED to salvage it's multi-million dollar miracle of military hardware and genetics research by aiming at the obvious exposed fungus-thing attached to the unit's neck, before jumping straight on the assured total destruction route? It's not like Ritsuko didn't go "oh hey that thing's an Angel" the moment Bardiel exposed itself. Interesting note: The "cuz to prevent the risk of contamination" theory doesn't work here. EVA-00 wasn't instantly flagged for utter elimination after being exposed to Bardiel; it just had its arm disconnected. And if you're a fairly secret military branch truly concerned about a small area of contamination (EVA-03's body) being spread, then squirting potentially contaminated blood over an entire city block and all over EVA-01 is the last thing you should try.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sat Aug 08, 2009 10:42 pm I'm sorry, but the answer is very apparent. There was no stopping the Dummy System. And nobody, except maybe Gendo and Ritsuko knew exactly what it was capable of and what it would do. I doubt Maya, Hyuga, or Fuyutsuki would have guessed it was going to go that overboard. Besides, she was in berserk mode. I doubt if they would have sent an abort signal if it would have even had any effect. Why didn't Gendo warn them or do anything to stop it? Because he wanted it to happen. Hence the smile the entire time Unit-03 was being destroyed. The end of the world is coming, he could care less about some people getting contaminated. And just for fun, BARDIEL IS THE BEST ANGEL EVER, BOOSH!

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:06 pm TBH the bardiel fight always pisses me off. I put the blame for this trainwreck squarely on Shinji, if he hadn't been so fucking useless and tried to rescue the pilot ramiel-style instead of just sitting there Gendo wouldn't have been forced to use the dummy system. Perhaps that is too harsh, Gendo, Fuyutsuki, Ritsuko or Misato should have advised Shinji to attempt a rescue.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:12 pm Probably the entire Eva's body was irretrievably contaminated, and the entry plug was just Bardiel's base of operations. Guessing there isn't much to say about the dummy system's messy and inefficient implementation of orders beyond "Digitized Rei has some serious emotional problems". DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Why didn't Gendo warn them or do anything to stop it? Because he wanted it to happen. Hence the smile the entire time Unit-03 was being destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:13 pm Maybe Gendo wanted him to be pounded into mush. The Dummy System could have been designed to make sure that there is absolutely no chance of an angel surviving the attack. I guess he was smiling because it was functioning to his expectations. The saftey of the other pilot and the Eva were apparently none of his concern. As for the contamination thing, maybe Bardiel didn't fuse because it couldn't fuse due to Unit-01 being derived from Lilith, unlike the other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:20 pm Reichu wrote: Ritsuko and Misato were "preoccupied" at the time.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:57 pm Come on, when has Gendo ever given a rat's ass about any Eva other than his precious Yui? Granted, I doubt he expect THAT to happen, but I couldn't imagine that he cared that much.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Aug 09, 2009 12:33 am Sammaeloo wrote: As for the contamination thing, maybe Bardiel didn't fuse because it couldn't fuse due to Unit-01 being derived from Lilith, unlike the other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Aug 09, 2009 12:38 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Sammaeloo wrote: As for the contamination thing, maybe Bardiel didn't fuse because it couldn't fuse due to Unit-01 being derived from Lilith, unlike the other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 09, 2009 2:28 am Sammaeloo wrote: Maybe Bardiel had some sort of sympathy or something like that toward the Adam based Evas, and hatred toward Unit-01 and Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 09, 2009 2:57 am Reichu wrote: So Bardiel's peculiar interest in Eva-01 could actually be stemming, at least in part, from this link, and he'd be literally channeling Toji's antipathy.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:36 am Reichu wrote: DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Why didn't Gendo warn them or do anything to stop it? Because he wanted it to happen. Hence the smile the entire time Unit-03 was being destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:46 am Reichu wrote: Probably the entire Eva's body was irretrievably contaminated, and the entry plug was just Bardiel's base of operations.

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:10 am The sense I got from those flashbacks was that Toji was contemplating how his dislike of the Evangelions and their pilots (long-suppressed, but perhaps never dealt with?) was changed by the fact that he was now becoming one. He was reflecting on the past, not burning with ongoing animosity. Or, at least that's how I saw it.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:19 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Shouldn't have NERV at least TRIED to salvage it's multi-million dollar miracle of military hardware and genetics research by aiming at the obvious exposed fungus-thing attached to the unit's neck, before jumping straight on the assured total destruction route?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:36 am To put it simply, Gendou is a heartless asshole who doesn't give a shit about other people, all he cares about is his precious Yui which is inside unit 01... not to mention his attitude towards Shinji which is not "daddy-like".

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:40 am trueno_twentyone wrote: To put it simply, Gendou is a heartless asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 09, 2009 12:24 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Though i don't quite see it in this specific cse, applying Reichu's spin on the situation, Gendo could be insecure about:

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Aug 09, 2009 1:52 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Reichu wrote: Probably the entire Eva's body was irretrievably contaminated, and the entry plug was just Bardiel's base of operations.

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sun Aug 09, 2009 6:11 pm So how does NERV just remotely know when one EVA is worth trying to salvage and another is a completely foregone conclusion? Just because 00's arm was severed doesn't automatically mean some of Bardiel's cells couldn't have already spread to the unit's body and went dormant. They know next to nothing about Bardiel's full physiology.

It's not like Ritsuko didn&
